tagline: The Art of Swimming Pools and Spas

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built One Detail
at a Time
hero.subheadline: For 28 years, Wisconsin families have trusted us to build, maintain, and transform their backyard pools and spas. We build one project at a time so every detail is perfect — from the first sketch to your first splash.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Custom Pools, Spas & Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Built for Wisconsin Life
services.subtitle: From custom inground pools to hot tub repairs and complete outdoor living spaces, we handle every phase of your backyard transformation with 28 years of hands-on expertise.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: From concept to completion, we design and build inground pools tailored to your yard, style, and budget — with meticulous attention to lighting and landscaping.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Services
cards.description: Sales, installation, and expert repair for all hot tub and swim spa brands. Keep your spa running perfectly year-round in Wisconsin weather.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Restore your pool's look and watertight seal with professional vinyl liner replacement. Wide selection of patterns and colors to choose from.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, saltwater systems, and full pool automation upgrades. We install only proven, industry-leading equipment.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your aging pool into a modern backyard centerpiece. From resurfacing to complete renovation, we bring new life to tired pools.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Custom outdoor kitchens, bars, water features, and structures designed to turn your backyard into the ultimate entertainment destination.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool Project in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form below. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest quote with no pressure and no hidden costs.

steps.title: We Design & Build with Care
steps.description: Our experienced crew works one project at a time, giving your pool the focused attention it deserves. Every detail — from plumbing to landscaping — is handled right.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Dive into your new pool or spa with complete confidence. We stand behind our work and offer ongoing maintenance to keep everything running beautifully.

about.label: Why Watertown Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned. Referral-Built. Detail-Obsessed.
about.description: Since 1998, Accurate Pool & Spa Services has been the trusted name in Southeastern Wisconsin for pool construction, hot tub service, and outdoor living. We're a family business that has grown almost entirely through customer referrals — because when you do the job right, people talk. We build one project at a time so nothing gets rushed and every detail gets the attention it deserves.

features.title: One Project at a Time
features.description: We never juggle multiple builds. Your pool gets our full attention from groundbreaking to final walkthrough.

features.title: Referral-Built Business
features.description: Most of our clients come from word-of-mouth. That only happens when you consistently deliver quality workmanship.

features.title: Financing Available
features.description: Dream pool out of budget? We offer flexible financing options so you can build now and pay over time.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written quote upfront. We believe in honest pricing — what we quote is what you pay.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool, spa, and service call we complete. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it — no excuses, no extra charges. After 28 years and hundreds of projects, our reputation is everything. We treat your backyard like it's our own.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 6-10 weeks depending on the design complexity and weather. We'll give you a realistic timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you service all hot tub brands?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our technicians are experienced with all major hot tub and swim spa brands. Whether you need a simple repair, routine maintenance, or a complete overhaul, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: We serve Watertown, Lake Country, and all of Southeastern Wisconsin. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call — we're happy to work with you.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer flexible financing options to make your dream pool affordable. Ask us about current rates and terms during your consultation — there's no obligation.

faqs.question: Can you remodel my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Yes, pool remodeling is one of our specialties. From liner replacement and equipment upgrades to complete redesigns with new water features and lighting — we can transform any aging pool.

testimonials.name: Paul's Client
testimonials.text: Paul and the team installed our in-ground pool and we couldn't be happier with the results. Fantastic experience from start to finish — they truly care about every detail.

testimonials.name: Tom R.
testimonials.text: Tom and his crew did a fantastic job and took care of everything. They completed the job on time and the quality was outstanding. We couldn't be happier with our new pool.

testimonials.name: Linda M.
testimonials.text: Paul is very knowledgeable and professional. He has been servicing our hot tub for many years and always explains what we need. Timely responses and honest advice — highly recommend.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from a family-owned team with 28 years of experience. We'll visit your property and give you an honest quote — no pressure, no gimmicks.
